reviews.text:
Personal Experience Note

(The period of dealing with the system, receiving it, and communicating with them was between December 2025 and January 2026)

I'd like to share our experience with IraqSoft regarding their hotel management system.

Initially, the agreement was clear, and payment was made before the system was installed. However, after activation, problems began to appear:

Additional charges were requested for essential modifications that should have been included in the agreement.

The timeframe for implementation and modifications was excessively long, with no clear deadline.

Almost every modification required a new payment request, with amounts close to the subscription fee itself.

The system was provided based on a standard design, but unfortunately, we noticed clear typographical errors in the interfaces. When we requested changes, they asked us to pay additional fees that nearly equaled the annual subscription cost.

Frankly, our impression is that there is a weakness or problem on the technical side, and this is being compensated for by demanding more money instead of providing a real solution.

As of the time of writing this review, no clear solution or refund has been provided. All the details mentioned are fully documented with conversations and transfer receipts for anyone interested.

This is our personal experience, and I wanted to share it so that anyone considering dealing with them is aware and can ensure everything is clear and documented from the beginning.
reviews.original_text:
تنويه عن تجربة شخصية
(فترة التعامل واستلام النظام والتواصل كانت خلال ديسمبر 2025 ويناير 2026)

حاب أشارك تجربتنا ويا شركة عراق سوفت بخصوص نظام إدارة الفنادق مالهم.

بالبداية كان الاتفاق واضح، وتم الدفع قبل تنصيب النظام، لكن بعد التشغيل بدت تظهر مشاكل:
طلب مبالغ إضافية على تعديلات أساسية كان المفروض تكون ضمن الاتفاق.
المدة اللازمة للتنفيذ والتعديل كانت طويلة جدًا بدون التزام بزمن واضح.
كل تعديل تقريبًا يقابله طلب دفع جديد، وبمبالغ قريبة من قيمة الاشتراك نفسها.
النظام يُقدَّم على أساس تصميم ستاندرد، لكن للأسف لاحظنا وجود أخطاء مطبعية واضحة داخل الواجهات، و عند طلب التغيير يطلبون مننا دفع مبالغ إضافية تقارب تكلفة الاشتراك السنوي.

بصراحة، الانطباع اللي طلعنا بيه إنه أكو ضعف أو مشكلة بالجانب التقني، ويتم تعويض هذا الشي بطلب فلوس أكثر بدل تقديم حل فعلي.

وحتى وقت كتابة هذا التقييم، لم يتم تقديم حل واضح أو استرجاع للمبلغ المدفوع، و جميع التفاصيل المذكورة موثّقة بالكامل بالمحادثات وإيصالات التحويل لمن يهمه الأمر.

هذا الكلام يمثل تجربتنا الشخصية، وحبيت أنقلها حتى أي جهة تفكر تتعامل وياهم تكون على اطلاع، وتحرص إن كل شيء يكون واضح ومكتوب من البداية.

reviews.text:
Terrible experience with the maintenance department. I sent my laptop for a simple hard drive replacement, and they returned it with multiple new issues (speaker, fingerprint, face recognition all broken) plus an outdated virus-infected Windows. Worse, they wiped ALL my data from the old hard drive without permission - a drive that was BitLocker encrypted, proving it was done on their end.

When confronted, the employee (Mohammed) made excuses, promised to recover the data, then did nothing for days. When I followed up, he denied everything and even laughed about it.

Each department kept sending me to another, disclaiming responsibility despite being one company.

reviews.text: I have been trying to book an iPhone 16 Pro for two months, and the experience with Masterstore has been absolutely terrible. Their communication is completely unhelpful and unresponsive, leaving me frustrated at every step. On top of that, their website is poorly designed, slow, and riddled with glitches, making it nearly impossible to complete a purchase. This level of incompetence is unacceptable for a retailer, and I would not recommend them to anyone.

I reserved new iPhone 15 pro max 512GB from Master store website and i put a contact phone number with no whats app application.

I called the costumes service just to ask them that i want to change my contact phone number with a number has whats app OR if they can call OR text me OR email my when my iPhone arrive but they refused to do any of those!

I decided to go to the store at Al-karrada, street 42 trying to fix this issue but they were unhelpful with me and they told me that i lost my reservation because i don’t have  whats app on my phone number!!

So I lost my reservation just because i don’t have whats app on my phone number!
I think its too easy for a company like Master to fix this simple issue!

I brought all of my previous iPhones from Master store and Im done with them.

I got the worst costumer service ever!

You lost a costumer for sure and I’m not gonna deal with this store any more

reviews.text:
From experience... the worst repair service I've ever seen in every way.
My phone had a cracked screen, and the replacement was $50 with a warranty.
No problem.
How long will it take?

-Two days and you'll receive it.
-Okay, great.
-Two days later, is it finished?

-No way, come back at noon.
-Noon came, is it finished?

-Two days, God willing, and it'll be finished.
-Okay, I let it slide and waited.
-Two days later, is it finished?

-The screen isn't available...

Unbelievable! I was going back and forth from Hilla, fed up! I took the phone and left.
After a while, I came back when I had some free time, so I thought I'd get it fixed before the warranty expired.
-The same scenario repeated itself: come back in two days, and all that nonsense. Finally, it was five days until it was finished.
-Okay, I received the phone, and the screen was working. I looked at it at noon, and there was a small crack. They told me the crack might get bigger, but not like this!!! Now the whole thing is broken and cracked.
What kind of company repairs things and they break them? This only happens in Iraq. Samsung shouldn't let such examples represent them.

reviews.text: The venue management doesn't deserve respect. The person who invited me was a scammer. After paying the full price for the party, which included two performance groups, I was shocked to find they weren't there on the day of the event. I had paid the full amount, and when I asked for a refund, he refused. He had forged the receipt, stating that there were no groups, unlike the original receipt. My advice is not to pay the full amount before the event because the venue management is dishonest. In addition, the venue's setup is not up to standard and doesn't justify the price paid.

reviews.text:
IDB was established in 2011; with a paid-up capital of 250 billion Iraqi dinars, (equivalent to 210 million US dollars) as of today. The bank is one of the leading banks locally and regionally, in offering commercial banking services to corporate and retail customers. The Bank has a competitive edge in its conclusive electronic banking services offering.

Despite its newness, the bank was able to acquire a significant share of the total domestic trade and banking market, through a network of more than 16 branches and more than 550 employees, covering all major provinces in Iraq, including the Kurdistan region and the Middle Euphrates and southern Iraq, along with a representative office in Beirut and Dubai. The Bank’s branch network will reach 25 branches in 2020 and as per the Board of Directors approved strategy.

The International Development Bank for Investment and Finance’s success lies in the ability of the Board of Directors, more specifically its chairman, Mr. Ziad Khalaf Abed in laying firm foundations and principles, in addition to comprehensive policies and procedures covering the Bank’s wide departments and divisions. Further; IDB adopts complete corporate governance manual as as stipulated by leading practices.

reviews.text:
The bank is refusing to issue Mastercards and is rejecting the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and embassy agencies, stating that it will not issue Mastercards to agents in the presence of clients residing in Western countries.

So what is the point of agency services at embassies and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs if a bank branch, controlled by an individual acting on personal whims, refuses to recognize Ministry of Foreign Affairs documents?

We are now preparing to file a complaint with the Ministry of Foreign Affairs to uncover the full truth behind these individual actions.

reviews.text:
"I recently visited Dream City Mall and was impressed with the variety of shops and entertainment options available. The mall offers a great shopping experience with a wide range of stores, including LC Waikiki which has great quality clothing and frequent discounts. The cinema is also a highlight, as I was able to watch multiple movies in the same day, including John Wick 4 and The Guardians of the Galaxy.

There are many entertainment activities to choose from, including a kids playzone and virtual games. However, one downside is that the escalators can be confusing at times, as they go up and down seemingly randomly. I also had a disappointing experience at Herdees restaurant, but there are many other dining options to choose from.

Overall, Dream City Mall is a great destination for a day of shopping and entertainment."

reviews.text:
Pros
1- A good supermarket that offers almost all of a family's daily and weekly food and consumer needs.
2- There's a wide variety of items on display.
3- The space is good and the aisles are decent.
4- The prices are fairly reasonable.
5- There's a good number of cashiers.

Cons
1- The cashier process is slow.
2- There's no pricing information on many items.
3- There's no clearly defined section or corner for diet and diabetics.
4- There's no clearly defined section for organic products.
reviews.original_text:
🟩الايجابيات
١- سوبر ماركت جيد ويقدم تقريبًا كل احتياجات العائلة اليومية والاسبوعية من المواد الغذائية او الاستهلاكية.
٢- هناك تنوع كبير في المواد المعروضة.
٣- المساحة جيدة واروقة المكان لا بأس بها.
٤- الاسعار جيدة نوعًا ما
٥- يوجد عدد جيد من موظفي الكاشير.

🟥السلبيات
١- بطئ عملية المحاسبة عند الكاشير
٢- عدم وجود التسعيرة على كثير من المواد
٣- عدم وجود ركن او قسم مخصص وواضح لمنتجات "الدايت" و اصحاب السكري.
٤- عدم وجود قسم واضح ومخصص للمواد والمنتجات العضوية (Organic)
